chapter_title.en: Chapter on a Man Borrowing to Perform Hajj and the Obligation of Hajj on Someone in Debt

text: 2905 - وَ سَأَلَ رَجُلٌ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فَقَالَ لَهُ إِنِّي رَجُلٌ ذُو دَيْنٍ فَأَتَدَيَّنُ وَ أَحُجُّ فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ هُوَ أَقْضَى لِلدَّيْنِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2905 - A man asked Abu Abdullah (as): "I am a man in debt. Should I borrow money and perform Hajj?"
Imam (as) replied: "Yes, it is more effective in settling the debt."
